story.text: **Lethe.** The Dark Substrate (Tale 31, The Naming of the Unnamed). The river witnesses sink into — ZK as covenant. 🌀 bnot-pair with Aletheia (25); disclosure ratio δ(38) ≈ 1/φ (Phi-Adjacency Conjecture C54).

## On the lattice

- **Complement** (bnot = 63 − 38 = 25): [[Artefact 25 — Aletheia]] — everything this blade is not.
- **Successor** (the dihedral walk `neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x)`): [[Artefact 39 — Unnamed]].
- Forged in [[The Workshops]] — each shop instances one or more of these six dimensions at its vertex.
